sentences.target: C'est un privilège de travailler ici.

translations.fr: C'est un privilège de travailler ici.
translations.en: It’s a privilege to work here.
translations.de: Es ist ein Privileg, hier zu arbeiten.
translations.zh-Hans: 在这里工作是一种特权。
translations.yue: 喺呢度工作係一種特權。
translations.vi: Được làm việc ở đây là một đặc quyền.
translations.nl: Het is een voorrecht om hier te werken.
translations.hi: यहाँ काम करना एक विशेषाधिकार है।
translations.nb: Det er et privilegium å jobbe her.
translations.id: Bekerja di sini adalah sebuah hak istimewa.
translations.sv: Det är ett privilegium att arbeta här.
translations.ro: Este un privilegiu să lucrezi aici.
translations.da: Det er et privilegium at arbejde her.
translations.ja: ここで働くのは特権です。

tokens.explanation: Clitic demonstrative pronoun serving as subject in the copular construction.
Copular auxiliary linking the subject to the predicate noun.
Indefinite article (masculine singular) introducing the predicate noun.
Common noun functioning as the predicate nominal after the copula.
Preposition introducing an infinitival complement of the noun ('privilège').
Infinitive verb functioning as a complement to the noun via 'de'.
Adverb of place specifying location.

translations.de: Manchmal erkenne ich mein Privileg an.
translations.it: A volte riconosco il mio privilegio.
translations.zh-Hans: 有时我承认自己的特权。
translations.yue: 有時我承認自己嘅特權。
translations.vi: Đôi khi tôi thừa nhận đặc quyền của mình.
translations.hi: कभी-कभी मैं अपने विशेषाधिकार को स्वीकार करता हूँ।
translations.el: Καμιά φορά αναγνωρίζω το προνόμιό μου.
translations.nb: Noen ganger erkjenner jeg mitt privilegium.
translations.id: Kadang-kadang saya mengakui hak istimewa saya.
translations.da: Nogle gange erkender jeg mit privilegium.
translations.ja: ときどき自分の特権を認めます。

tokens.explanation: First-person singular subject pronoun.
Main verb in the present indicative (1st person singular); takes a direct object.
Possessive determiner (1st person singular, masculine) modifying the noun.
Common noun functioning as the direct object of the verb.
Adverb of frequency modifying the clause.

sentences.target: Nous avons le privilège d'entrer avant tout le monde.
sentences.reading: /nu zavɔ̃ lə pʁivilɛʒ d‿ɑ̃tʁe avɑ̃ tulə mɔ̃d/

translations.fr: Nous avons le privilège d'entrer avant tout le monde.
translations.ipa: /nu zavɔ̃ lə pʁivilɛʒ d‿ɑ̃tʁe avɑ̃ tulə mɔ̃d/
translations.en: We have the privilege to enter before everyone.
translations.es: Tenemos el privilegio de entrar antes que los demás.
translations.de: Wir haben das Privileg, vor allen anderen hineinzugehen.
translations.it: Abbiamo il privilegio di entrare prima degli altri.
translations.ko: 우리는 다른 사람들보다 먼저 들어갈 특권이 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们有特权可以比别人先进入。
translations.yue: 我哋有特權可以比其他人先入場。
translations.ru: У нас есть привилегия войти раньше всех.
translations.pt: Temos o privilégio de entrar antes dos outros.
translations.he: יש לנו פריבילגיה להיכנס לפני כולם.
translations.tr: Herkesten önce içeri girme ayrıcalığımız var.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi có đặc quyền được vào trước mọi người.
translations.nl: We hebben het voorrecht om eerder dan iedereen naar binnen te gaan.
translations.uk: Ми маємо привілей увійти раніше за всіх.
translations.hu: Kiváltságunk van, hogy mindenki előtt bemehessünk.
translations.hi: हमारे पास सबसे पहले अंदर जाने का विशेषाधिकार है।
translations.el: Έχουμε το προνόμιο να μπούμε πριν από όλους.
translations.nb: Vi har privilegiet å komme inn før alle andre.
translations.id: Kami punya hak istimewa untuk masuk lebih dulu daripada semua orang.
translations.sv: Vi har privilegiet att gå in före alla andra.
translations.ro: Avem privilegiul de a intra înaintea tuturor.
translations.cs: Máme privilegium vstoupit dříve než ostatní.
translations.da: Vi har privilegiet til at komme ind før alle andre.
translations.fi: Meillä on etuoikeus päästä sisään ennen muita.
translations.ja: 私たちは他の人より先に入場できる特権があります。

tokens.explanation: First-person plural subject pronoun.
Main verb in the present indicative (1st person plural).
Definite article marking the following noun as specific.
Common noun functioning as the direct object of 'avons'.
Elided preposition 'de' introducing an infinitival complement ('entrer').
Infinitive verb serving as the complement to the noun via 'de'.
Preposition introducing a phrase of precedence.
Determiner modifying 'le monde'; contributes to the fixed expression 'tout le monde' (everyone).
Definite article within the noun phrase 'le monde'.
Common noun; in the idiom 'tout le monde' the NP denotes 'everyone'.

sentences.target: Ce ticket donne un privilège temporaire.

translations.fr: Ce ticket donne un privilège temporaire.
translations.en: This ticket gives a temporary privilege.
translations.es: Esta entrada otorga un privilegio temporal.
translations.de: Dieses Ticket gewährt ein vorübergehendes Privileg.
translations.it: Questo biglietto concede un privilegio temporaneo.
translations.yue: 呢張票會賦予臨時特權。
translations.pt: Este bilhete concede um privilégio temporário.
translations.tr: Bu bilet geçici bir ayrıcalık sağlar.
translations.vi: Vé này cấp một đặc quyền tạm thời.
translations.nl: Dit kaartje geeft een tijdelijk voorrecht.
translations.hu: Ez a jegy ideiglenes kiváltságot ad.
translations.hi: यह टिकट अस्थायी विशेषाधिकार देता है।
translations.el: Αυτό το εισιτήριο δίνει ένα προσωρινό προνόμιο.
translations.nb: Denne billetten gir et midlertidig privilegium.
translations.id: Tiket ini memberikan hak istimewa sementara.
translations.sv: Den här biljetten ger ett tillfälligt privilegium.
translations.ro: Acest bilet oferă un privilegiu temporar.
translations.da: Denne billet giver et midlertidigt privilegium.
translations.ja: このチケットは一時的な特権を与えます。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner modifying 'ticket'.
Common noun serving as the subject of the verb.
Main verb in the present indicative (3rd person singular).
Indefinite article introducing the direct object noun phrase.
Common noun functioning as the direct object of 'donne'.
Adjective modifying 'privilège'.

Nous avons le privilège d'entrer avant tout le monde.
Ce ticket donne un privilège temporaire.

en: It’s a privilege to work here.
We have the privilege to enter before everyone.
This ticket gives a temporary privilege.
